title: Allow more filtering based on timeline column for views
excerpt: Right now, the options to filter views by timeline are very limited. The dates column allows more robust filtering but having a start date column and end date column is cumbersome and doesn’t display well in the Gantt vi…

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, the options to filter views by timeline are very limited. The dates column allows more robust filtering but having a start date column and end date column is cumbersome and doesn’t display well in the Gantt view. I would expect a project management platform to allow more view options based on timeline. Ideally it would be custom ranges but at a minimum a last week, current week, next week option should be there.

My specific use case is to create a view for project teams to see a snapshot of their project for the current week and upcoming week in a table view. The table has all the information needed for the project but right now I can only filter down to current week or all future weeks+current week. That is not helpful.

posts.author: AnjaDK (Anja Dijkstra)
posts.cookedHtml:
more filtering based on start or end date of the timeline would be great!
just filtering on due today is not enough, more options to set the number of days or even due this week or this month would help in keeping an eye on things.

posts.author: themightypm (MightyPM)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates for better filters on timeline columns?
